commands: uv run --frozen --python 3.12 python -m abd_acceptance --contract AC-S02-P01 --evidence machine/evidence
explicit_unknowns: TAB Web Services and TAB Studio access are not granted or authorized by this research.
Sportsbet automation or API permission was not established by the scoped official source set.
Gmail consent, OAuth verification, restricted-data policy and security-assessment readiness remain unresolved; Gmail is not connected.
Cloudflare account, free-plan headroom and deployment are unverified; mainland-China in-country delivery is outside the A$0 scope and is not claimed.
The owner-declared existing OVH VPS was not inspected; 7x24 runtime, capacity, billing and availability remain unverified.
Owner jurisdiction, KYC, provider eligibility, self-exclusion status and provider terms acceptance remain unverified.
The 30% monthly target, all-market coverage, actual return and ROI remain unverified and are not guaranteed.

hashes.model_not_executed_reason: S02/P01 freezes official platform and regulatory research; it executes no prediction model, strategy, order or return evaluation.

detail.pass_gate: 每个事实有URL、检索日期和来源等级。
detail.title: 官方平台与监管调研

detail.baseline: 未实现或旧包存在冲突/缺口
detail.measurement: 由 AC-S02-P01 的机器验收判定器执行固定输入、阈值和证据检查。
non_goals: 不自动提交、确认或重试真实订单
不以降低证据或风险门追赶30%月目标
不引入付费数据或付费程序接口依赖
detail.observation_period: 开发期每次提交；上线后持续
detail.problem: 若未完成“官方平台与监管调研”，只研究与ABD直接相关的官方文档、论文和开源项目，明确采用、适配、拒绝和许可证。将缺少可执行、可验收或可恢复的基础。
detail.target: 每个事实有URL、检索日期和来源等级。
detail.title: 官方平台与监管调研
detail.user: 单一账户持有人及自动开发/运维代理

environment: Ubuntu Linux 持续集成环境
无外部网络的确定性测试模式
evidence_requirements: 测试报告及命令退出码
输入、参数、代码、模型和输出SHA-256
失败路径截图或结构化日志
inputs: S02/P01 冻结正向、边界、负向和故障输入
参数版本和来源版本哈希

oracle.rule: 每个事实有URL、检索日期和来源等级。

detail.pass_gate: 每个事实有URL、检索日期和来源等级。
detail.retention: 永久保留验收摘要；原始大体积证据按运维手册分层保留
detail.rollback: 关闭对应功能开关，恢复上一已签名制品，保留不可变证据并重放派生状态。
stop_condition: 发现法律、监管或来源合同实质冲突且无安全默认
严重安全事故或证据完整性失败

tests.method: 固定输入重放 + 属性测试 + 负向测试 + 故障注入
全部硬阈值在边界、±0.0001及不利赔率跳动下验证
相同输入、配置和制品哈希必须得到相同动作和证据哈希

detail.threshold: 每个事实有URL、检索日期和来源等级。
detail.title: 官方平台与监管调研唯一主验收

detail: This snapshot records scoped official-source findings, not legal advice.
URLs and metadata are retained; webpage bodies are not copied into the repository.
Provider terms, prices, limits, registers and policies can change and must be revalidated before enablement.
No source proves an ABD account, credential, API grant, deployment, runtime availability or market-data entitlement exists.

detail.unknown_fail_closed: The scoped official source set does not establish permission or capability; ABD must not enable or claim it.
detail.verified_source_fact: The cited official source supported the scoped statement on the retrieval date.

checks.detail: screen scrape, web services and Studio

detail.statement: The scoped Sportsbet terms and help sources examined for S02/P01 do not establish an official automation or API permission for ABD; this is not a claim that no such permission can exist.

checks.detail: paid China Network rejected; no mainland claim
SLA and existing-instance state remain distinct

detail.reason: Every scoped risk has a conservative disable, no-recommendation or owner-only action; this does not certify legal compliance.

checks.detail: bankroll, zero cash, advice-only, runtime target

index.pass_gate: 每个模型设计主张可回溯论文。
